svg.title: Landon Foister Cybersecurity Portfolio Visual Board
svg.desc: Cyber-brutalist and Y3K website concept board showing typography, palette, desktop homepage, requested page modules, and mobile layout direction.
svg.text: CYBER BRUTALISM + Y3K / PROFESSIONAL SECURITY PORTFOLIO
ENERGETIC IN HERO PANELS / RESTRAINED IN READING
building resilient systems and competing at the
Golang SSH administration tooling for command
Proxmox cyber range for security research,
Writing surface prepared for future research
POSTER-LIKE ENERGY IN DISCOVERY. CLEAN READING IN PROOF.
